code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  mut i = 0
  mut count = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut neg = false
  mut val = 0
  mut has_digit = false
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(input, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if in_num
          if has_digit and not neg and val > 0
            count = count + 1
          end
          in_num = false
          neg = false
          val = 0
          has_digit = false
        end
      else
        if not in_num
          in_num = true
          neg = false
          val = 0
          has_digit = false
          if b == 45
            neg = true
          else if b == 43
            neg = false
          else if b >= 48 and b <= 57
            val = b - 48
            has_digit = true
          end
        else
          if b >= 48 and b <= 57
            val = val * 10 + (b - 48)
            has_digit = true
          end
        end
      end
    when None
      i = n
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if has_digit and not neg and val > 0
      count = count + 1
    end
  end
  println("positive=#{count}")
end
